title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 442.180 - Certificate to be endorsed on conveyance
text:
442.180.  Certificate to be endorsed on conveyance. — Every court or officer taking the proof or acknowledgment of any conveyance or instrument of writing affecting real estate, or the relinquishment of the dower of a married woman, shall grant a certificate thereof, and cause the same to be endorsed on such conveyance or instrument of writing.
(RSMo 1939 § 3413) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3026; 1919 § 2185; 1909 § 2796
